description: Key Responsibilities: Web Application Development & Maintenance Design, develop, and maintain internal web-based systems to support business operations, ensuring performance, scalability, and usability. COT Web Ordering Platform - Develop and enhance the COT web ordering system, enabling users to review, manage. and place orders for stores and items. - Collaborate with stakeholders to ensure accurate ordering workflows, and integrate processes with warehouse allocation and delivery operations. Store Shelf Label System -Build and support the store shelf label (price tag) system, including label generation and printing functionality. -Ensure accuracy, consistency, and ease of use for in-store price labeling operations. Finance P&L Automation Platform Develop and maintain a web-based platform for automated Profit & Loss (P&L) reporting. Streamline financial data processing, improve reporting accuracy, and support business decision-making through reliable and timely insights. System Integration & Process Improvement Work closely with cross-functional teams (operations, warehouse, finance) to integrate systems and optimize workflows. Troubleshooting & Support Provide ongoing technical support, bug fixing, and system enhancements to ensure smooth daily operations. Qualification & Experience Requirements Diploma or Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or related field. Minimum 3 years of experience in full stack web application development. Proficiency in programming language (e.g., Java, C#, Python, or Pure PHP). Experience with database management (e.g., MySQL or SQL Server). Basic understanding of web technologies (HTML, CSS, JavaScript). Familiarity with APIs and system integration. Experience in mobile application development (e.g., Flutter) will be added advantage. Currently office based Kelana Business Centre, Petaling Jaya (near to Glenmarie LRT station) Moving to Wisma Segi office at Kampung Melayu Subang, Shah Alam Q4 2026.
